name: send_message
description: Send a message to an active chat conversation as an agent. Supports text messages to ongoing visitor sessions.

parameters.name: property_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for your tawk.to property.

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the active chat session.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The text message to send to the visitor.
parameters.example: Thanks for reaching out! Let me look into that for you.

body.message: Thanks for reaching out! Let me look into that for you.
